title: Moonlight Muon x QK-Norm

input.brief: Changes how the model is trained: a newer method (Muon) that nudges its settings in a smarter direction each step, plus a small stabilizer that keeps part of the attention math from growing too large and breaking training.

expected_output.summary: Structured result with metrics and artifacts.

public_summary: Changes how the model is trained: a newer method (Muon) that nudges its settings in a smarter direction each step, plus a small stabilizer that keeps part of the attention math from growing too large and breaking training.
